source: AAMC matriculant data (medians) + 2026 AMCAS Applicant Guide; see Agent/reference/amcas/ and Agent/reference/msar/
note: Tiers are advisory adcom norms, not hard cutoffs. Science/BCPM GPA weighs more than cumulative for MD. CARS below the floor is flagged regardless of total.

gpa_tiers.label: Strong
gpa_tiers.note: At or above median for most MD programs.

gpa_tiers.label: Competitive
gpa_tiers.note: In range for most programs; may limit top-10 reach.

gpa_tiers.label: Borderline
gpa_tiers.note: Competitive for mid-tier MD; DO more accessible.

gpa_tiers.label: Challenging for MD
gpa_tiers.note: Significant upward trend or post-bacc typically needed.

mcat_tiers.label: Top tier
mcat_tiers.note: Competitive for all MD programs including top-10.

mcat_tiers.label: Borderline MD
mcat_tiers.note: Competitive for DO; some MD with a strong app.

cars_note: Many programs flag a CARS score below 127 regardless of total.
